## HKCU

| 路径 | Hive | 主题 | 状态 | 页面 | 相关场景 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run</span><br><span class="ww-path-pill">HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\RunOnce</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">用户级登录启动项，只作用于对应用户 SID 的登录会话。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">NTUSER.DAT</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">持久化</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">稳定</span> | [HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run](hkcu/software/microsoft/windows/currentversion/run.md) | [自启动与持久化](../questions/persistence.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |

## HKLM

| 路径 | Hive | 主题 | 状态 | 页面 | 相关场景 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\ProfileList</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">SID 到用户 profile 目录的机器级映射。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SOFTWARE</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">账户</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">稳定</span> | [HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\ProfileList](hklm/software/microsoft/windows-nt/currentversion/profilelist.md) | [账户与安全](../questions/accounts-security.md)<br>[Shell / Explorer 用户行为](../questions/shell-explorer.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">交互式登录流程、Shell、Userinit、自动登录和部分 Winlogon 扩展配置。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SOFTWARE</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">持久化</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">账户</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">稳定</span> | [HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon](hklm/software/microsoft/windows-nt/currentversion/winlogon.md) | [自启动与持久化](../questions/persistence.md)<br>[账户与安全](../questions/accounts-security.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run</span><br><span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\RunOnce</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">机器级登录启动项，适用于所有用户登录后的自动启动命令。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SOFTWARE</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">持久化</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">稳定</span> | [HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run](hklm/software/microsoft/windows/currentversion/run.md) | [自启动与持久化](../questions/persistence.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet</span><br><span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet001</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">SYSTEM hive 中保存系统控制配置的真实控制集。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SYSTEM</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">系统配置</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">设备</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">持久化</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">稳定</span> | [HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x](hklm/system/controlset/index.md) | [常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md)<br>[自启动与持久化](../questions/persistence.md)<br>[USB 与外接设备](../questions/usb.md)<br>[RDP 与远程访问](../questions/rdp.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Enum\USBSTOR</span><br><span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Enum\USBSTOR</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">USB Mass Storage 设备枚举信息。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SYSTEM</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">设备</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">已审阅</span> | [HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Enum\USBSTOR](hklm/system/controlset/enum/usbstor.md) | [USB 与外接设备](../questions/usb.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services</span><br><span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Services</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">服务、驱动、网络组件和部分系统组件的配置入口。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SYSTEM</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">系统配置</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">持久化</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">网络</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">稳定</span> | [HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Services](hklm/system/controlset/services/index.md) | [自启动与持久化](../questions/persistence.md)<br>[程序执行痕迹](../questions/execution.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\Tcpip\Parameters\Interfaces</span><br><span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Services\Tcpip\Parameters\Interfaces</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">单个网络接口的 IP、DNS、DHCP、网关和租约配置。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SYSTEM</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">网络</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">系统配置</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">已审阅</span> | [HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Services\Tcpip\Parameters\Interfaces](hklm/system/controlset/services/tcpip/parameters/interfaces.md) | [网络与系统环境](../questions/network.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\MountedDevices</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">卷 GUID、DOS 盘符和设备标识之间的映射。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SYSTEM</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">设备</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">已审阅</span> | [HKLM\SYSTEM\MountedDevices](hklm/system/mounteddevices.md) | [USB 与外接设备](../questions/usb.md)<br>[Shell / Explorer 用户行为](../questions/shell-explorer.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| <span class="ww-path-pill">HKLM\SYSTEM\Select</span><br><span class="ww-table-note">CurrentControlSet 与真实 ControlSet00x 的映射关系。</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--hive">SYSTEM</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">系统配置</span> | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--status">稳定</span> | [HKLM\SYSTEM\Select](hklm/system/select.md) | [常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md)<br>[自启动与持久化](../questions/persistence.md)<br>[USB 与外接设备](../questions/usb.md) |
